MENU

Erasmus + Traineeship Grants

(2024-2025)

Based on the country groupings prepared by the European Commission, the National Agency of Türkiye has determined the following grant distribution.

Including spring semester 2024 - 2025,

from this period for students who benefited from Erasmus mobility on the basis of their country grouping of the European Commission, set by the National Agency of Türkiye, the monthly grant amounts are as follows:

Payment to Student

Students who participate in the mobility are paid in two installments. In the grant calculations, the start and end days of the mobility are included in the duration of the participation certificate. The student who does not follow the curriculum specified in the University Learning Agreement, fails by not participating in the courses or other studies, reserves the right not to make the remaining payment partially or completely or to request the refund of the payment made. Unpaid and / or requested amount is returned to the grant resources.

National Grants and Scholarships

The Higher Education Institution is obliged to ensure the continuation of the scholarships and grants that students currently participating in the Erasmus mobility program during their Erasmus student education period. This situation can neither be terminated nor interrupted nor reduced during the student's study abroad. Higher Education Institutions cannot limit the right of students who meet the national scholarship or loan application conditions to the Erasmus grant.
